title: M365 AI & Collaboration Engineer - Copilot
description:
About GlobalFoundries

GlobalFoundries is a leading full-service semiconductor
foundry providing a unique combination of design,
development, and fabrication services to some of the world’s
most inspired technology companies. With a global
manufacturing footprint spanning three continents,
GlobalFoundries makes possible the technologies and systems
that transform industries and give customers the power to
shape their markets. For more information, visit www.gf.com.

Introduction:

The Modern Workplace Engineer – Employee Productivity AI
role provides operational expertise for Microsoft 365
services, focusing on AI-driven productivity solutions. This
role will report into the Director of Intelligent Workspace
that includes administration and governance of SharePoint,
Power Platform, Viva Suite, and Copilot. The role ensures
compliance, service reliability, and adoption of modern
workplace technologies to enhance employee experience.

Key Responsibilities:

- Hands-on development of Copilot Agents.  Familiar with pro-
  code development methodology and copilot connectors using
  Copilot Studio

- Implement governance policies for Copilot agents and Power
  Platform environments.

- Administer Power Platform environments (Dev/Test/Prod),
  enforce DLP policies, and monitor compliance.

- Configure and maintain Viva Connections/Home and SharePoint
  portals, including audience targeting and content
  governance.

- Operate service reliability runbooks for SharePoint/Teams
  and validate Copilot readiness for meeting experiences.

- Collaborate with Security teams to package evidence for
  compliance audits and manage platform-security
  escalations.

- Maintain analytics dashboards for adoption and compliance
  across Copilot, Viva, and Power Platform.

Required Qualifications:

- 4–7 years of experience in Microsoft 365 engineering with
  hands-on Power Platform administration.

- Experience operating Copilot Studio per governance standards
  and managing ALM in Managed Environments.

- Strong knowledge of SharePoint architecture, Viva Suite
  configuration, and Teams integration.

- Experience implementing security-aligned governance (labels,
  DLP, audit) and compliance frameworks.

Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with AI-driven productivity tools and automation
  including emerging integration options including MCP
  (Model Context Protocol)

- Familiarity with enterprise governance frameworks and
  security best practices.

GlobalFoundries is an equal opportunity employer,
cultivating a diverse and inclusive workforce. We believe
having a multicultural workplace enhances productivity,
efficiency and innovation whilst our employees feel truly
respected, valued and heard.As an affirmative employer, all
qualified applicants are considered for employment
regardless of age, ethnicity, marital status, citizenship,
race, religion, political affiliation, gender, sexual
orientation and medical and/or physical abilities. All
offers of employment with GlobalFoundries are conditioned
upon the successful completion of background checks, medical
screenings as applicable and subject to the respective local
laws and regulations.

Information about our benefits you can find here:
https://gf.com/about-us/careers/opportunities-asia
responsibilities: Hands-on development of Copilot Agents using pro-code development methodology and copilot connectors in Copilot Studio
Implement governance policies for Copilot agents and Power Platform environments
Administer Power Platform environments across Dev/Test/Prod and enforce DLP policies and compliance monitoring
Configure and maintain Viva Connections/Home and SharePoint portals with audience targeting and content governance
Operate service reliability runbooks for SharePoint/Teams and validate Copilot readiness for meeting experiences
Collaborate with Security teams on compliance audits and manage platform-security escalations
Maintain analytics dashboards for adoption and compliance across Copilot, Viva, and Power Platform
use_cases: AI-driven employee productivity solutions using Microsoft Copilot
Enterprise collaboration and knowledge management via SharePoint and Viva Suite
Automated workflows through Power Platform with AI integration
Meeting experience enhancement with Copilot readiness
Governed AI agent deployment for enterprise productivity
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on development of Copilot Agents
using Copilot Studio with pro-code development methodology
and copilot connectors. This is directly building and
deploying AI agents/copilots, not just supporting AI
infrastructure or working near AI systems.
